zh.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Gruffudd於1175年出生在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾白 康維。她於大約1198年與Iorwerth Gam ab Owain在英國威爾斯丹比爾利朗勒朋維結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1215年在英國威爾斯丹比爾利朗勒朋維享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Gruffudd于1175年出生在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾白 康維。她于大约1198年与Iorwerth Gam ab Owain在英国威尔斯丹比爾利朗勒朋維结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1215年在英国威尔斯丹比爾利朗勒朋維享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Gruffudd was born in 1175, in Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom. She married Iorwerth Gam ab Owain about 1198, in Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1215, in Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Gruffudd est née en 1175, à Penrhyn by Conway, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Iorwerth Gam ab Owain environ 1198, à Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1215, à Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Gruffuddは1175年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアペンルhイン ビー コンワイで生まれた。約1198年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアランゴレンペングウエルンでIorwerth Gam ab Owainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1215年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアランゴレンペングウエルンで41歳で死去した。

ko.Penrhyn, Llandygai, Caernarvonshire, Wal: 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 펜히 비 콘웨이
ko.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Gruffudd(은)는 1175년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 펜히 비 콘웨이에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1198년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랭렌 펜그워에서 Iorwerth Gam ab Owain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1215년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랭렌 펜그워에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Penrhyn, Llandygai, Caernarvonshire, Wal: пенрин би конвеи, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Gruffudd родилась в 1175 г. в местности пенрин би конвеи, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Iorwerth Gam ab Owain около 1198 г. в местности пэнгвирн, лланголлен, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1215 г. в местности пэнгвирн, лланголлен, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.
